titleStmt.title: SII 39.247: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 247. (A.R. No. 247 of 1916.) SRIMUSHNAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. NITYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL •••••••••• ŚAKA 1426 (1503-04 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to an order of Triṇētranātha Kachchirāyar, son of Paḷḷigoṇḍa perumāḷ Kachchirāyar, who held the birudā Rāhuttamiṇḍaṉ to relieve the tenants of the Padinēḻuppaṟṟu district. from the hefty taxation imposed by the Kaṇṇadiya rulers, which had forced them to leave their holdings. Hereafter he also ordered that the lands shouldbe measured by 34 feet Kōl every year and fixed conducive rates of taxation. Accordingly about 5 paṇam on puñjey, 20 on nañjey, Araikkālpaṇam on Arasaper ṟukkuḍi, 3 paṇam on Saṭṭitari, 2 paṇam on Kanmālar, 3 paṇam on each Taṟi held by Kaikkōlan, (1/4) paṇam on pasu, (1/2) on Erumai, 8 Āṭṭukku (1/4) paṇam 1 paṇam for a Kurumpāḍu were imposed.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śakāpatam 1000 4 100 2 10 6 l mel cellā niṉṟa Utirodakkāri samvat
sarattu minaṉāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tacammiyum somavāramum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāḷ rākutta mi
ṇṭaṉ Iḷavaracar maṇavāḷaṉ saṅkirāmatīraṉ vāḷaracar maṇavāḷaṉ vayira virakaṇṭaṉ Aracamā
tāṇṭaṉ Araca nārāyaṇaṉ kāśmiratecattu śrīmat tuvārakāpuri caṅkai viḷantai paḷḷik ko
ṇṭa perumāḷ kaccirāyar kumārar tiriṇettiranāta kaccirāyar patiṉēḻu paṟṟu nāṭṭava
ṟkuk kuṭutta paṭṭayam Inta cīrmai kaṉṉaṭiyava paṭcattile Irekai Ēṟin Itiṉāla kuṭikku nerukkam Āyikuṭiyum kulaintatu
curupa kulaiccalākaiyil nāḷatu mutalukku nilam Aḷantu koḷḷattakkatu Āka kaṟpitta niṟayam muppattunālu Āṭiyum vilakka
ṭiyum Iṭṭa kolāle varuṣam varuṣam toṟum nilam Aḷantu ceñcātam Āka koḷḷa niṟcayirtta puḻuti pacāṉam varaku keḻvaraku Iḷavari
caiyāṉa koḷḷu payaṟu Uḷuntu kaṇpu Iruṅku Iḷavaricai maṭittu niṉṟa nilattukkum kaṭamai koḷḷa niṉṟayam paṇṇina pakuti
viniyokam kuṭimāṭu kāṇikkai nallerutu naṟpacu koṇikai vīrmuṭṭu Āṭṭu vilai Eṇṇey vilai koḻi koḻi muṭ
ṭai vaṭṭam nāṭṭaṭi kāṇikkai Ōlai Eḻuttuvattaṉai Aṉutaravattaṉai coṭimaram pārvai Atikāri coṭi kāṇikkāṭu coṭi yillaiyam
cammātam pattukku Oru paṇavaṭṭam Āḷ makāṇai jīvitam māvaṭai kuḷavaṭai Ērimīṉvilai maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa paḻavari pu
tuvari Uḷpaṭa puñcekku māvukku patiṉañcu paṇamum naṉcekku 2 10 paṇamum māvukkut tūṇi patakku koḷḷum patakku paṟṟum Āka ko
ḷḷak kaṭavatāyum Aracapeṟṟukku kuṭikku Araikkāl paṇamum calattarattukku caṭṭittarikku mūṉṟu paṇamum kaṇmāḷar kuṭimakkaḷukku Iraṇ
ṭu paṇamum kaikkoḷar nicavarkku tarikku mūṉṟu paṇamum koḷḷak kaṭavararkaḷavum Iṭaittuṟaikku kaṇkeṭu mulaikkeṭu nikki niṉṟa māṭṭu
kku pacuvukku kālpaṇamum Erumaikku Araippaṇamum Eṭṭu Āṭṭukku kāl paṇamum kurumpāṭu Oṉṟukku tu Āṭṭukku Oru paṇamum
Āka koḷḷak kaṭavatākavum Inta niṉṟayattukku Akitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaik karaiyile kārām pacuvai koṉṟa pāvat
tile pokak kaṭavatākavum Ivai tīra nettira nātakaccirāyar
Digital edition of SII 39.247 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
